title: Awesome Crystals
body:
Part of the Awesome Mods -- requires https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-core!

- Same logic as Budding Amethyst but for all ores!
- Craft budding blocks using amethyst blocks and a block of the resource
- Grows on all sides at once

https://github.com/shkschneider/mc_awesome/blob/main/README.md
